metadata.name: Job Description
metadata.value: (Update Version with Comp info 11/2023 LINK – Below Is Older templateMarqeta is on a mission to change the way money moves. We’re one of the earliest enablers of embedded finance, a market opportunity sized up in the trillions. Our card issuing platform provides unprecedented flexibility and control for companies to issue cards, authorize transactions, and manage payment operations in real time.   Marqeta is powering the most well known brands in the new economy (Block, Cash App, Affirm, Instacart, Doordash, Uber, Walmart, etc). Today nearly 8 out of 10 Americans use a product powered by Marqeta every week. This is the opportunity of a lifetime to work with innovators around the world and unlock equitable financial access for all.As a Senior Integration Engineer, Tokenization, your mission at Marqeta will be to serve as a trusted technical and payments advisor for Marqeta's customers, digging in to provide solutions throughout the customer tokenization life cycle — enabling cardholders to provision payment cards to Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay across mobile and web surfaces. While this role focuses primarily on tokenization APIs, a working knowledge of the core platform — Cards, Users, and Card Products — will greatly improve your chances of success.You will be on the front line communicating directly with customers (particularly our customer’s developers, product owners, and project managers) and you will partner with groups within Marqeta’s organization.We work Flexible First. This role can be performed remotely anywhere within the United States. We’d love for you to join us!What You’ll Do:Engage with customers: Our revenue & program management teams rely on us to ensure the key technical influencers at our customers and prospects deeply understand our technology, what makes our platform different and better than that of our competitors, and how to quickly get integrated and live.Balance big picture & tiny details: You are empathetic, putting yourself  in the customer’s shoes and delivering strong recommendations to solve their problems. This requires zooming out to see the bigger picture, putting simple requests in context to highlight downstream impacts or “gotchas” before they occur - but also getting your hands dirty, performing precise, detailed tasks with little oversight to make sure the customer’s vision can become a reality.Understand & evangelize the customer technical experience: As you work with cross-functional teams and a diverse array of customers, you will have unparalleled insights on Marqeta's technical capabilities, unique features, and the benefits our platform offers. You'll serve as a tokenization technical resource for the delivery and onboarding team and act as a 'voice of our customers' in external-facing engagements, surfacing implementation learnings and customer feedback to internal Product and Technology teamsWhat We are Looking For:Own the technical implementation of customers onto our platform including technical advisement, environment configuration and troubleshootingBecome an expert on Marqeta’s tokenization APIs and develop best practices on deploying themWork closely with Product Management, Engineering, and cross-functional stakeholders to improve processes that drive the execution of the customer’s technical onboarding journeyTroubleshoot collaboratively as customers integrate with our platform, guiding them through technical documentation and assessing root causes for errorsMaintain a deep understanding of Marqeta’s product and features.Communicate confidently and effectively while balancing best practices, regulatory limitations, and awareness of Marqeta’s evolving platform capabilitiesRequirements4-6+ years of experience working with enterprise customers, responsible for technical discussions in a sales engineering, implementation, or technical account management capacity Proficient working with APIs (you don’t need to be a developer but you must be comfortable explaining API concepts to our customers)Experience with Bruno or Postman. SQL and Datadog are a plus Ability to understand complex enterprise requirements and communicate technical concepts clearly (verbally & in writing), tailoring recommendations based on customer needs and evolving offeringsAbility to identify customer onboarding  issues and work cross functionally to develop scalable solutions.  Ability to prioritize, manage, and deliver on multiple projects simultaneously; highly motivated and able to work against aggressive schedulesExperience in the B2B technology space with a knack for understanding what makes businesses tick and what drives their growthStrong understanding of payments specifically issuing (e.g. tokenization, networks, point-of-sale)Bachelor’s Degree preferred, or equivalent combination of education and experience
